questions.subject: Computer Architecture

question.en: Explain the role of CPU cache and compare the typical purpose of L1 and L2 cache.
question.zh-Hans: 解释 CPU 缓存的作用，并比较 L1 和 L2 缓存的典型用途。
question.zh-Hant: 解釋 CPU 快取的作用，並比較 L1 和 L2 快取的典型用途。
question.ms: Terangkan peranan cache CPU dan bandingkan kegunaan biasa cache L1 dan L2.

en: How do L1 and L2 cache help a processor?
zh-Hans: L1 和 L2 缓存如何帮助处理器？
zh-Hant: L1 和 L2 快取如何幫助處理器？
ms: Bagaimanakah cache L1 dan L2 membantu pemproses?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; no static answer was included in the downloaded source.

questions.subject: Computer Architecture

question.en: Describe how a CPU can be constructed from digital logic, including data paths, control, and memory interfaces.
question.zh-Hans: 描述如何使用数字逻辑构建 CPU，包括数据通路、控制和内存接口。
question.zh-Hant: 描述如何使用數位邏輯建構 CPU，包括資料路徑、控制和記憶體介面。
question.ms: Huraikan cara CPU boleh dibina daripada logik digital, termasuk laluan data, kawalan dan antara muka memori.

en: What are the major building blocks of a digital CPU?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; consult the linked course materials for the worked treatment.

source.name: MIT OpenCourseWare 6.004 Computation Structures

questions.subject: Information Technology

question.en: Compare a process and a thread, and explain why synchronization is needed when concurrent threads share resources.
question.zh-Hans: 比较进程和线程，并解释并发线程共享资源时为什么需要同步。
question.zh-Hant: 比較程序和執行緒，並解釋並行執行緒共享資源時為什麼需要同步。
question.ms: Bandingkan proses dan thread, serta terangkan mengapa penyegerakan diperlukan apabila thread serentak berkongsi sumber.

en: Why can concurrent threads require locks or condition variables?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; no static answer was included in the downloaded source.

source.name: MIT OpenCourseWare 6.033 Computer System Engineering
source.license: MIT OpenCourseWare Creative Commons; verify individual file notices

questions.subject: Networking

question.en: Explain how the link, internetworking, and transport layers cooperate to deliver data across a TCP/IP network.
question.zh-Hans: 解释链路层、网际层和传输层如何协作，在 TCP/IP 网络中传输数据。
question.zh-Hant: 解釋鏈路層、網際層和傳輸層如何協作，在 TCP/IP 網路中傳輸資料。
question.ms: Terangkan cara lapisan pautan, internetwork dan pengangkutan bekerjasama menghantar data melalui rangkaian TCP/IP.

en: What responsibilities are divided among the main TCP/IP layers?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; no static answer was included in the downloaded source.

source.name: Engineering LibreTexts, An Introduction to Computer Networks

questions.subject: Networking

question.en: What problem does routing solve, and why do large networks need routing protocols rather than a single fixed path table?
question.zh-Hans: 路由要解决什么问题？为什么大型网络需要路由协议，而不是一张固定路径表？
question.zh-Hant: 路由要解決什麼問題？為什麼大型網路需要路由協定，而不是一張固定路徑表？
question.ms: Apakah masalah yang diselesaikan oleh penghalaan, dan mengapa rangkaian besar memerlukan protokol penghalaan?

en: How do routing protocols help networks adapt?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; review the linked MIT networking materials before converting to a graded item.

source.name: MIT OpenCourseWare 6.033 Computer System Engineering

questions.subject: Networking

question.en: Explain why DNS is a naming system and describe the basic relationship between a hostname, a resolver, and an authoritative name server.
question.zh-Hans: 解释 DNS 为什么是命名系统，并描述主机名、解析器和权威名称服务器之间的基本关系。
question.zh-Hant: 解釋 DNS 為什麼是命名系統，並描述主機名稱、解析器和權威名稱伺服器之間的基本關係。
question.ms: Terangkan mengapa DNS ialah sistem penamaan dan hubungan asas antara nama hos, resolver dan pelayan nama berwibawa.

en: What happens when a resolver looks up a domain name?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; no static answer was included in the downloaded source.

questions.subject: Cybersecurity

question.en: Identify several ways a computer system can fail or be attacked, and explain why security and privacy must be considered during system design.
question.zh-Hans: 列举计算机系统可能发生故障或遭受攻击的方式，并解释为什么系统设计必须考虑安全和隐私。
question.zh-Hant: 列舉電腦系統可能發生故障或遭受攻擊的方式，並解釋為什麼系統設計必須考慮安全和私隱。
question.ms: Kenal pasti beberapa cara sistem komputer boleh gagal atau diserang, dan terangkan mengapa keselamatan serta privasi perlu dipertimbangkan dalam reka bentuk.

en: Why should security be part of system design from the beginning?

questions.answerStatus: Source topic extracted; use the linked course assignments for deeper study.

questions.subject: Computer Science

question.en: Explain why distributed systems need mechanisms for consistency, fault tolerance, coordination, and recovery.
question.zh-Hans: 解释分布式系统为什么需要一致性、容错、协调和恢复机制。
question.zh-Hant: 解釋分散式系統為什麼需要一致性、容錯、協調和復原機制。
question.ms: Terangkan mengapa sistem teragih memerlukan mekanisme ketekalan, toleransi kesalahan, penyelarasan dan pemulihan.

en: What makes reliability difficult in a distributed system?

questions.subject: Networking

question.en: What is network congestion, and how can transport protocols respond without making packet loss and delay worse?
question.zh-Hans: 什么是网络拥塞？传输协议如何应对拥塞而不加剧丢包和延迟？
question.zh-Hant: 什麼是網路壅塞？傳輸協定如何應對壅塞而不加劇丟包和延遲？
question.ms: Apakah kesesakan rangkaian, dan bagaimanakah protokol pengangkutan bertindak balas tanpa memburukkan kehilangan paket dan kelewatan?

en: Why is congestion control necessary on shared networks?
